## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the checks you ran and their results:

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Other relevant validation (describe below)

## Security and release impact

- [ ] This change does not introduce a security or release impact.
- [ ] This change has a security or release impact; describe the affected behavior, mitigation, and rollout considerations below.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this change focused and updated relevant documentation or tests.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, credentials, or private contact information.
- [ ] I followed the contribution and security guidance.
